name: Morgok's Krushas
inspire: In a Power step, instead of playing a Power card, you can pick a friendly fighter with 3 or more Waaagh! tokens. Remove 3 Waaagh! tokens from that fighter, then Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: Waaagh! Energy
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter Attacks or an enemy fighter Attacks and a friendly fighter is the target of that Attack.
reactions.flavorText: The more the ladz scrap, the scrappier the ladz become.
reactions.rulesText: Give that friendly fighter a Waaagh! token.

reactions.name: Ded 'Ard
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after damage is inflicted on a friendly fighter with any Waaagh! tokens as part of an Attack.
reactions.flavorText: Hitting an orruk Brute is a lot like hitting a brick wall, only more dangerous and less rewarding.
reactions.rulesText:
Remove up to 2 Waaagh! tokens from that fighter. For each Waaagh! token you removed, pick 1 of the following:
• Give that friendly fighter a Guard token.
• Give the attacker a Stagger token.

You can only use this ability once per game.

reactions.name: Shut It, Pipsqueak!
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after an opponent plays a Ploy.
reactions.flavorText: The Krushas know just how to shut down a gobby little git: with a bellow loud enough to burst eardrums!
reactions.rulesText: Remove up to 2 Waaagh! tokens from a friendly fighter and then roll an Attack dice for each token you removed. If the roll contained any {icon:fury} or {icon:crit}, that Ploy has no effect. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Get a Move On, Ya Gitz!
abilities.flavorText: The other Krushas know full well that if they don't get stuck in, Morgok will put the boot in.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Give your leader ({icon:leader}) a Charge token. Then, push each other friendly fighter up to a number of hexes equal to the battle round number. You can only use this ability once per game.
